description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for building and deploying documentation. The workflow should trigger on a daily and weekly schedule, on push to specific branches and tags, and on pull requests to specific branches. It should also have a manual dispatch option with an input for expensive builds. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, using a specific container image, and perform various steps including checking out code, caching dependencies, building and installing wheels, testing the installed version, building homepage and graphs, building documentation with Doxygen and Sphinx, and uploading artifacts to GitHub Pages.
